title: Period Integrals as Delta-d Plus-2

analysis.object: T707: Period Integrals as Delta-d Plus-2 depth analysis

period_map_deltad2.description: Period integral: gamma(omega) = integral; Deltad=+2 from EML-0 algebraic cycle to EML-2 complex number
period_map_deltad2.reason: Period map is Deltad=+2: the measure theorem applied to Hodge theory; integration adds 2 strata

algebraicity_constraint.description: Algebraic period theorem: algebraic cycles have periods in algebraic numbers; EML-2 constraint
algebraicity_constraint.reason: Algebraic periods: if gamma is algebraic cycle, integral is algebraic number; EML-2 arithmetic constraint

depth_arithmetic_constrains.description: Depth arithmetic: Deltad=+2 from EML-0 to EML-2 is forced; EML-1 intermediate impossible
depth_arithmetic_constrains.reason: Depth arithmetic constrains periods: no EML-1 intermediate in the integration; direct Deltad=+2

partial_converse.description: Partial converse: if period is algebraic number, is gamma algebraic cycle? This IS the Hodge conjecture
partial_converse.reason: Hodge rephrased: is the Deltad=+2 map surjective onto algebraic EML-2? Yes iff Hodge true

analysis.theorem: T707: Period Integrals as Delta-d Plus-2 (S986).

key_theorem: T707: Period Integrals as Delta-d Plus-2 (S986).
